# Third Bridge

Seamlessly incorporate critical context and trusted insights from industry experts as part of your financial and business analysis. Refocus on extracting high-quality, reliable information by querying Third Bridge’s best-in-class substantial Library of expert content and data. Our MCP systematically and securely instructs Large Language Models (LLMs) to query insights from our database into their systems, streamlining your workflows and improving your output

You can use Third Bridge to:

**Equity / Variant Perception:**  
“Build a bull/bear case for Shopify using Third Bridge expert interviews — focus on variant perception around merchant churn and international expansion.”

**Credit / Underwriting:**  
“Run a credit underwrite on Thames Water using expert transcripts — I need perspectives on liquidity risk, regulatory dynamics, and recovery scenarios.”

**PE / Commercial Diligence:**  
“I’m screening European cold chain logistics for a PE deal — pull a sector map with competitive positioning, customer concentration risk, and margin sustainability from Third Bridge experts.”
